Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An Unsolicited Guide to Being a Researcher [pdf] 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024) 117 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. POSSE – Publish on your Own Site, Syndicate Elsewhere 264 upvotes, 56 comments
  4. Building an FPGA 3dfx Voodoo with Modern RTL Tools 212 upvotes, 48 comments
  5. Dataframe 1.0.0.0 67 upvotes, 12 comments
  6. GrapheneOS will remain usable by anyone without requiring personal information 503 upvotes, 144 comments
  7. The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon 450 upvotes, 128 comments
  8. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs by Antithesis 76 upvotes, 17 comments
  9. Five years of running a systems reading group at Microsoft 184 upvotes, 52 comments
  10. Flash-MoE: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Laptop 368 upvotes, 117 comments
  11. Project Nomad – Knowledge That Never Goes Offline 510 upvotes, 184 comments
  12. The way CTRL-C in Postgres CLI cancels queries is incredibly hack-y 96 upvotes, 27 comments
  13. PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading 706 upvotes, 333 comments
  14. The LCA problem revisited [pdf] 21 upvotes, 5 comments
  15. The future of version control 578 upvotes, 317 comments
  16. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 209 upvotes, 108 comments
  17. Why I love NixOS 370 upvotes, 257 comments
  18. Reports of code's death are greatly exaggerated 475 upvotes, 339 comments
  19. Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US 26 upvotes, 11 comments
  20. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 198 upvotes, 146 comments
  21. Migrating to the EU 462 upvotes, 381 comments
  22. Tin Can, a 'landline' for kids 213 upvotes, 176 comments
  23. Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2] 35 upvotes, 21 comments
  24. Attractive students no longer receive better results as classes moved online 208 upvotes, 180 comments
  25. Jazz CRJ9 at New York on Mar 22nd 2026, collision with fire truck on runway 46 upvotes, 31 comments
  26. General Motors Is Assisting with the Restoration of a Rare EV1 45 upvotes, 35 comments
  27. You are not your job 274 upvotes, 290 comments
  28. Fear and Fragility: The Glass Delusion and Its History 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. What young workers are doing to AI-proof themselves 179 upvotes, 277 comments
  30. GoGoGrandparent (YC S16) is hiring Back end Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 10:30pm, 23 March 2026. Source here.
